title: trident smp 9 resources
description: resourcepack in form of a mod to easier make players install it in their clients. useless unless member of Trident SMP
body:
![TRIDENT 9. now with better end!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ab4a00ba16e4375e8e0851d8af2dbe2506c4f73.jpeg)
this mod/texturepack is useless unless you are a member of my smp. we modded some mods using datapacks and this is the assets pack for the modded mods. it also features translation keys for mods that are not translated to languages we use or if the translations are trash

uploaded for convenience of players that use modrinth app.
the smp is only accessible to my friends so dont even try to contact me about it

feel free to download this mod/resourcepack and edit it for yourself or if you want to yoink some translations or textures off of it
